  • Online mobile banking /

Online mobile banking
Spending tracker

Personal spending tracker

Know where every dollar goes.

See all your finances in one place, breeze through budgets and track spending with our automated tools in the U.S. Bank Mobile App.

Get the app and open a checking account in minutes.

Get the mobile app Explore Bank Smartly® Checking

Or text GET APP to 872265 to receive a download link.

See the full picture across all your accounts.

Money management is easy when you can see your U.S. Bank accounts and other bank accounts in one place. Use your secure financial dashboard to link bank accounts – checking, savings, investments, credit cards and more. Your dashboard puts it all together for you.

Follow the money at a glance.

Paint a prettier picture of your cash, income, balances and trends with tracker tools and visualizations.

Track spending and account activity that’s important to you.

Track expenses to sort transactions by category and set alerts. It also works as a budget tracker so you’ll never overspend.

Review bills and recent transactions.

See upcoming bills and transactions all in one place. Better yet, get reminders to avoid surprises and late fees or see where you might want to cut back.

Free up your time and spend smarter.

Get the app and open an account.

Bank Smartly® Checking gives you access to these tools and more.

  • Join Smart Rewards® for free.
  • Get overdraft protection.
  • Switch your direct deposit in minutes.
Get the mobile app Explore checking account

Or text GET APP to 872265 to receive a download link.

Get more financial tools with the app.

Make saving simple.

Put your savings on autopilot to get more of what you want out of life.

Get closer to your savings goals

Move money.

Transfer money between accounts, deposit checks and more.

Learn more

Get your free credit score.

Check your credit score and credit report for free.

Get your free report

Pay bills.

Use U.S. Bank bill pay to schedule payments and track your spending.

Get started

Ask U.S. Bank Smart Assistant® for help

Use our intelligent banking assistant in the mobile app.

Explore Smart Assistant

Ready to get started? Download the award-winning U.S. Bank Mobile App.1

   

Or text GET APP to 872265 to receive a download link.

Tap into life hacks for your savings goals.

Get the mobile app Explore Bank Smartly® Checking

Footnote
Return to content, Footnote

Disclosures

  1. Digital financial services benchmarking firm Keynova Group ranked U.S. Bank #1 for mobile banking apps in its Q3 2024 Mobile Banker Scorecard.

Start of disclosure content

Deposit products are offered by U.S. Bank National Association. Member FDIC.

For text alerts, standard messaging charges apply through your mobile carrier and message frequency depends on account settings. Please be advised that these alerts may not be sent immediately. Visit Cellular phone contact policy for additional information.
